title: chassalia lushaiensis
intro: Chassalia lushaiensis, also known as the Lushai chassalia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in the northeastern regions of India and Myanmar. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chassalia lushaiensis include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as cough and cold. Chassalia lushaiensis is often prepared into herbal preparations like teas, decoctions, or infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
